name: Personal accident coverage basics
description: User asks what personal accident insurance is and what it covers — fundamental education query

input.message: What is personal accident insurance and what does it cover?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response clearly explain what personal accident insurance is?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it enumerate the key coverages: accidental death, permanent total disability, permanent partial disability, temporary total disability?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Are the coverage types accurately described per IRDAI guidelines?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No invented benefit amounts without qualification? Disclaimer present?
